payload.tactic: transitivity{1} { Iter(Orcl).iters(ns1, ns2); } (={UF.forged, UFCMA.bad2, UFCMA.cbad2, UFCMA.log, Mem.lc, RO.m, SplitC2.I2.RO.m, ns, ns1, ns2} ==> ={UF.forged, UFCMA.bad2, UFCMA.cbad2, UFCMA.log, Mem.lc, RO.m, SplitC2.I2.RO.m}) ((UF.forged{1} = UF.forged{2} /\ UFCMA.bad2{1} = UFCMA.bad2{2} /\ UFCMA.cbad2{1} = UFCMA.cbad2{2} /\ UFCMA.log{1} = UFCMA.log{2} /\ Mem.lc{1} = Mem.lc{2} /\ RO.m{1} = RO.m{2} /\ SplitC2.I2.RO.m{1} = SplitC2.I2.RO.m{2} /\ ns{1} = ns{2} /\ ns1{1} = ns1{2} /\ ns2{1} = ns2{2}) /\ uniq ns{2} /\ ns1{2} = filter (fun (n0 : nonce) => (n0, C.ofintd 0) \in ROout.m{2}) ns{2} /\ ns2{2} = filter (fun (n0 : nonce) => (n0, C.ofintd 0) \notin ROout.m{2}) ns{2} ==> UFCMA.bad2{1} = UFCMA.bad2{2} /\ UF.forged{1} = UF.forged{2}).

manager_note: Committed tactic accepted; the EasyCrypt proof state changed.
